description: A component that is used internally within context menus. If you want to create a custom context menu, you should look at ContextMenuItemSource.

fields.Highlight: Set and unset whether the item is being hovered over and should be highlighted.
fields.Label: The label element of this item.
fields._highlighted: The item is being hovered over.
fields._arc: The arc that makes up this item.
fields._outerRadius: The field that specifies the outer radius of this item.
fields._button: The button that makes up this item.
